subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! This servant of God declareth that for many a year, at morn and eventide [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده خدا این بنده خدا میگوید که چندین سنه میگذرد که در هر صبح و شام آن
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @idolatry, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
